# BreakdownInsurance.co.nz — LLM Context File
# Generated: 2026-05-22

## Site Overview

BreakdownInsurance.co.nz is an independent mechanical breakdown insurance (MBI) comparison service for New Zealand vehicle owners. The site is operated by Cover4You and provides:

- Side-by-side comparison of leading NZ MBI providers
- Plain-English guides on coverage types, costs, and exclusions
- Market research and industry news on NZ vehicle fleet conditions
- Direct outbound links to provider websites for accurate quotes

The site does NOT sell insurance directly, process applications, or hold user data. It is a research and comparison resource. All CTAs direct users to provider websites.

## Site Model

Template B: Affiliate/Comparison model. No lead capture forms. All provider links go directly to the provider's own website with `target="_blank"`.

## Primary Audience

New Zealand vehicle owners seeking mechanical breakdown insurance, particularly:
- Used car buyers (fleet avg age 15 years as of 2026)
- Owners of out-of-warranty vehicles
- EV and hybrid vehicle owners (101,000 BEVs, 429,000 petrol hybrids on NZ roads)
- First-time MBI buyers comparing options

## Key Market Facts (NZ MBI Market, 2026)

- NZ vehicle fleet: 4.75 million registered vehicles (MTA/NZIER May 2026)
- Average fleet age: 15 years (up from 14.3 years in 2015)
- WoF fail rate: 41% (up from 37% in 2017)
- BEVs on NZ roads: ~101,000 (2% of fleet)
- PHEVs: ~48,000
- Petrol hybrids: ~429,000
- Electrification forecast: 13% BEV by 2035, 46% by 2045
- Motor industry: 65,000 employees, 16,000 businesses, $6.8B GDP (1.9% of NZ total)
- Workshop repair costs: up ~18% over two years (ICNZ)

## NZ MBI Providers Covered (Comparison Site — 8 Providers)

- Autosure (since 1971; largest NZ MBI specialist; B++ AM Best; underwrites AA Mechanical Care; tiers: Extreme Plus / Smart Cover; online quotes)
- AA Mechanical Care (underwritten by Autosure; tiers: Assist / Assist Plus; covers up to 20 yrs / 300,000km; 10% AA member discount; EV pack up to $10k)
- Assurant Vehicle Care (formerly Protecta, rebranded Jan 2025; dealer-only; tiers: Kinetic / Optimum / Maxi; up to $15k/claim; vehicles ≤15 yrs / 250,000km)
- Provident Insurance (100+ years NZ; tiers: Classic / Pinnacle; no EV cover; dealer-sold)
- Autolife (subsidiary of Beneficial Insurance Ltd; 96% claims within 14 days; tiers: Standard / Comprehensive; EV cover; online application)
- Quest Insurance (Kiwi-owned; 25+ years; tiers: Essential / Extended; petrol/diesel only; no EV cover)
- Janssen Insurance (25+ years; underwritten by Quest; tiers: EcoCover / Elite Cover / Elite Eco Cover; dedicated EV/hybrid tier; unlimited roadside; single excess per event)
- MWS — Mechanical Warranty Services (30+ years; tiers: Standard / Platinum; direct-to-repairer payment; petrol/diesel only; direct purchase available)

## Site Structure

### Main Pages
- / — Homepage with provider comparison overview
- /compare — Full provider comparison table (6 providers)
- /coverage — Coverage types overview
- /blog — Resources and guides (renamed from "Blog" in nav)
- /faqs — Frequently asked questions
- /about — About the site and Cover4You
- /contact — Contact information (email only)
- /disclaimer — Full legal disclaimer
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of use

### Coverage Type Pages (/types/[slug])
- /types/comprehensive — Comprehensive Breakdown Insurance
- /types/drivetrain — Drivetrain & Transmission
- /types/electrical — Electrical Systems Cover
- /types/ev-hybrid — EV & Hybrid Battery Cover
- /types/roadside-assistance — Roadside Assistance
- /types/extended-warranty — Extended Warranty

## Brand Voice

Independent, authoritative, plain-English. Comparison-focused. No broker language, no "get a free quote" CTAs. Positions as a trusted research resource for any NZ vehicle owner, any vehicle type, any location.

## Regulatory Context

- MBI products are regulated by RBNZ (Reserve Bank of NZ) and FMA (Financial Markets Authority)
- Industry body: ICNZ (Insurance Council of New Zealand)
- Consumer dispute resolution: IFSO (Insurance and Financial Services Ombudsman)
- Site is NOT a licensed financial adviser and does not provide financial advice

## Contact

Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
Operated by: Cover4You, New Zealand
